assertion_results.text: Tasks target both 'trustify-backend' and 'trustify-ui' repositories with at least one task per repo
assertion_results.evidence: Task 1 (create-feature-branch) has Repository: trustify-backend. Task 2 (backend-comparison-endpoint) has Repository: trustify-backend. Task 3 (frontend-sbom-list-selection) has Repository: trustify-ui. Task 4 (frontend-comparison-page) has Repository: trustify-ui. Task 5 (frontend-test-fixtures) has Repository: trustify-ui. Task 6 (merge-feature-branch) has Repository: trustify-backend. At least 2 tasks target each repo.

assertion_results.text: Backend tasks have lower task numbers than the frontend tasks that depend on them
assertion_results.evidence: Task 2 (backend, 'Add SBOM comparison diff endpoint') is the backend implementation task. Frontend tasks that depend on it are Task 3 (number 3), Task 4 (number 4), and Task 5 (number 5). Task 4 explicitly states 'Depends on: Task 2'. Task 2 has a lower task number than all frontend tasks (3, 4, 5).

assertion_results.text: Frontend tasks reference Figma design context mentioning specific PatternFly components and visual specifications
assertion_results.evidence: Task 3 references PatternFly components: 'PatternFly's Table select variant', 'PatternFly Button with variant="primary"'. Task 4 extensively references Figma design context and PatternFly components: 'PatternFly Select (single, typeahead)', 'PatternFly ExpandableSection', 'PatternFly Badge', 'PatternFly EmptyState with CodeBranchIcon', 'PatternFly Skeleton placeholders', 'PatternFly Dropdown'. Task 4 also specifies visual details: green/red/blue/yellow badge colors per section, critical severity row highlighting using '--pf-v5-global--danger-color--100', empty state title 'Select two SBOMs to compare'.

assertion_results.text: At least one frontend task explicitly depends on a backend task in its Dependencies section
assertion_results.evidence: Task 4 (frontend, SbomComparePage) has in its Dependencies section: 'Depends on: Task 2 — Add SBOM comparison diff endpoint (backend API must exist for integration testing)'. Task 2 is a backend task (Repository: trustify-backend).

assertion_results.text: Frontend tasks reference paths from repo-frontend.md; backend tasks reference paths from repo-backend.md
assertion_results.evidence: Backend Task 2 references paths from repo-backend.md: 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs', 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs', 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/comparison.rs' (new file under existing model/ dir), 'tests/api/sbom_compare.rs', 'common/src/db/query.rs', 'common/src/error.rs', 'entity/src/sbom_package.rs', etc. Frontend Task 3 references paths from repo-frontend.md: 'src/pages/SbomListPage/SbomListPage.tsx', 'src/pages/SbomListPage/SbomListPage.test.tsx', 'src/components/FilterToolbar.tsx', 'src/hooks/useSboms.ts'. Frontend Task 4 references: 'src/api/models.ts', 'src/api/rest.ts', 'src/routes.tsx', 'src/hooks/useSbomById.ts', 'src/components/SeverityBadge.tsx', 'src/components/EmptyStateCard.tsx', 'src/pages/SbomDetailPage/components/PackageTable.tsx'. Frontend Task 5 references: 'tests/mocks/handlers.ts', 'tests/mocks/fixtures/sboms.json', 'tests/setup.ts'. All these paths exist in their respective repo structure manifests.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Repository section with a single repository name (not multiple repos per task)
assertion_results.evidence:
Task 1: '## Repository
trustify-backend' (single repo). Task 2: '## Repository
trustify-backend' (single repo). Task 3: '## Repository
trustify-ui' (single repo). Task 4: '## Repository
trustify-ui' (single repo). Task 5: '## Repository
trustify-ui' (single repo). Task 6: '## Repository
trustify-backend' (single repo). Every task has exactly one repository name in its Repository section.

assertion_results.evidence: Task 1 contains: '## Description' (line 12), '## Acceptance Criteria' (line 16), '## Test Requirements' (line 20). Task 2 contains: '## Description' (line 9), '## Acceptance Criteria' (line 63), '## Test Requirements' (line 75). Task 3 contains: '## Description' (line 9), '## Acceptance Criteria' (line 30), '## Test Requirements' (line 37). Task 4 contains: '## Description' (line 9), '## Acceptance Criteria' (line 74), '## Test Requirements' (line 92). Task 5 contains: '## Description' (line 9), '## Acceptance Criteria' (line 41), '## Test Requirements' (line 48). Task 6 contains: '## Description' (line 12), '## Acceptance Criteria' (line 16), '## Test Requirements' (line 20). All six tasks have all three required sections.

assertion_results.text: File paths in Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths from the corresponding mock repository structure manifests (repo-backend.md or repo-frontend.md), not invented paths
assertion_results.evidence: Task 2 (backend) Files to Modify: 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs' (exists in repo-backend.md line 46), 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs' (exists in repo-backend.md line 48), 'server/src/main.rs' (exists in repo-backend.md line 107). Files to Create: 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/comparison.rs' (new file under existing modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/ directory), 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/compare.rs' (new file under existing endpoints/ directory), 'tests/api/sbom_compare.rs' (new file under existing tests/api/ directory) — these are new files in existing directories from the manifest. Task 3 (frontend) Files to Modify: 'src/pages/SbomListPage/SbomListPage.tsx' (exists in repo-frontend.md line 33), 'src/pages/SbomListPage/SbomListPage.test.tsx' (exists in repo-frontend.md line 34). Task 4 (frontend) Files to Modify: 'src/api/models.ts' (exists in repo-frontend.md line 24), 'src/api/rest.ts' (exists in repo-frontend.md line 25), 'src/routes.tsx' (exists in repo-frontend.md line 53). Files to Create: new files under existing directories like 'src/hooks/', 'src/pages/'. Task 5 (frontend) Files to Modify: 'tests/mocks/handlers.ts' (exists in repo-frontend.md line 59). Files to Create: 'tests/mocks/fixtures/sbom-comparison.json' (new file in existing tests/mocks/fixtures/ directory).

assertion_results.text: Implementation Notes in every task reference specific file paths and code patterns from the repository, not abstract or generic guidance
assertion_results.evidence: Tasks 1 and 6 are bookend tasks (create-branch and merge-branch) and do not contain Implementation Notes sections. The assertion says 'every task' must have Implementation Notes referencing specific file paths — Tasks 1 and 6 lack this section entirely. While Tasks 2, 3, 4, and 5 all have detailed Implementation Notes with specific file paths and code patterns (e.g., Task 2 references 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/get.rs' for error handling pattern, 'common/src/db/query.rs' for query helpers; Task 3 references 'src/components/FilterToolbar.tsx'; Task 4 references 'src/hooks/useSboms.ts', 'src/components/SeverityBadge.tsx', 'src/pages/SbomDetailPage/components/PackageTable.tsx'), the bookend tasks do not have Implementation Notes at all.
